title: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
summary: 本文介绍了如何使用NVIDIA NeMo Automodel和Hugging Face Diffusers库大规模微调视频和图像模型，提供了高效训练和部署的解决方案。
highlights: Fine-tune video and image models at scale with NVIDIA NeMo Automodel and 🤗 Diffusers
使用NVIDIA NeMo Automodel和Hugging Face Diffusers库进行大规模微调
